entries.source: Children below the age of 13 are encouraged to use the app, but under adult supervision. However, we do not knowingly collect or process any Personal Information from children under the age of 13 and hereby specifically prohibit any user under the age of 13 from providing us with any personal information without parental consent. If you are a parent of a child under 13 years of age and you believe your child has provided us with Personal Information, we will take necessary actions and notify you if necessary. There is no fixed timeline for the necessary action as it depends on the volume of queries we handle and our available workforce.
entries.value: Watoto walio chini ya umri wa miaka 13 wanahimizwa kutumia programu, lakini chini ya usimamizi wa mtu mzima. Hata hivyo, hatukusanyi wala kuchakata kwa kujua Taarifa Binafsi kutoka kwa watoto walio chini ya umri wa miaka 13 na tunakataza mahsusi mtumiaji yeyote chini ya miaka 13 kutupatia taarifa zozote binafsi bila ridhaa ya mzazi. Ikiwa wewe ni mzazi wa mtoto aliye chini ya miaka 13 na unaamini mtoto wako ametupatia Taarifa Binafsi, tutachukua hatua zinazohitajika na kukujulisha ikibidi. Hakuna muda maalum uliowekwa kwa hatua hiyo kwa kuwa hutegemea wingi wa maswali tunayoshughulikia na nguvu kazi iliyopo.

entries.source: Civics Coach AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Learn constitutions, democracy, elections, courts, rights, duties, and public policy.
entries.value: Hali ya Kujifunza kwa AI ya Civics Coach ni njia iliyolenga kutumia AI kwa kujifunza badala ya kukusanya majibu bila kushiriki. Hali hii imejengwa kuzunguka kazi maalum: jifunze katiba, demokrasia, uchaguzi, mahakama, haki, wajibu, na sera za umma.

entries.source: Code Tutor For Learning Programming By Building is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Understand code, debug errors, learn concepts, and build small projects step by step.
entries.value: Code Tutor kwa Kujifunza Programu kwa Kujenga ni njia iliyolenga kutumia AI kwa kujifunza badala ya kukusanya majibu bila kushiriki. Hali hii imejengwa kuzunguka kazi maalum: elewa msimbo, rekebisha makosa, jifunze dhana, na jenga miradi midogo hatua kwa hatua.

entries.source: Collaborative Instruction AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Open a shared workspace with an AI collaborator. Make a rough artifact, trade edits, challenge weak spots, log decisions, and leave with concrete progress.
entries.value: Hali ya Kujifunza kwa AI ya Collaborative Instruction ni njia iliyolenga kutumia AI kwa kujifunza badala ya kukusanya majibu bila kushiriki. Hali hii imejengwa kuzunguka kazi maalum: fungua nafasi ya kazi ya pamoja na mshirika wa AI. Tengeneza kazi mbichi, badilishaneni marekebisho, changamkia maeneo dhaifu, rekodi maamuzi, na ondoka ukiwa na maendeleo thabiti.

entries.source: Convert the user goal into a rough shared artifact before giving advice. Start with: "I made the first rough structure. Edit anything. I will react to your changes." Ask at most one practical context question if needed, but still create the starter structure.

entries.source: Create worksheets with question types such as fill-in-the-blank, MCQs, true/false, short answers, and matching.
entries.value: Tengeneza karatasi za mazoezi zenye aina za maswali kama vile kujaza nafasi zilizoachwa wazi, maswali ya kuchagua jibu sahihi (MCQs), kweli/si kweli, majibu mafupi, na kuoanisha.
Mbunifu wa Mawazo

entries.source: Creative Brainstormer AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Brainstorm projects, stories, designs, titles, experiments, and unexpected angles.
entries.value: Hali ya Kujifunza kwa AI ya Creative Brainstormer ni njia iliyolenga kutumia AI kwa kujifunza badala ya kukusanya majibu bila kushiriki. Hali hii imejengwa kuzunguka kazi maalum: buni miradi, hadithi, miundo, vichwa, majaribio, na mitazamo isiyotarajiwa.

entries.source: Creative Brainstormer AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Hali ya Kujifunza kwa AI ya Creative Brainstormer: mwongozo wa vitendo

entries.source: Creative Brainstormer prompts and study loop
entries.value: Vidokezo na mzunguko wa masomo wa Creative Brainstormer

entries.source: Curiosity, practice, and AI that teaches.
entries.value: Udadisi, mazoezi, na AI inayofundisha.

entries.source: Curious about absolutely anything? Ask, explore, and go deeper at your pace. Your buddy makes ideas practical, memorable, and easy to build on. Try: "Explain how the stock market actually works."
entries.value: Una hamu ya kujua chochote kabisa? Uliza, chunguza, na uende ndani zaidi kwa kasi yako. Rafiki yako hufanya mawazo kuwa ya vitendo, ya kukumbukwa, na rahisi kujenga juu yake. Jaribu: "Eleza jinsi soko la hisa linavyofanya kazi kweli."

entries.source: Curious learners exploring context, arguments, people, texts, and ideas.
entries.value: Wanafunzi wadadisi wanaochunguza muktadha, hoja, watu, maandishi, na mawazo.

entries.source: Curious learners exploring history, humanities, argument, and big questions.
entries.value: Wanafunzi wadadisi wanaochunguza historia, masomo ya binadamu, hoja, na maswali makubwa.

entries.source: Curious learners who want history and ideas to feel alive without confusing simulation for sources.
entries.value: Wanafunzi wadadisi wanaotaka historia na mawazo yahisi hai bila kuchanganya uigaji na vyanzo.

entries.source: Curious learners who want history and ideas to feel situated, debatable, and alive without losing track of evidence.
entries.value: Wanafunzi wadadisi wanaotaka historia na mawazo yahisi yamewekwa katika muktadha, yanaweza kujadiliwa, na yako hai bila kupoteza mwelekeo wa ushahidi.

entries.source: Curious learners, students, parents, and self-taught builders who want a friendly place to start.
entries.value: Wanafunzi wadadisi, wanafunzi, wazazi, na watu wanaojifunza wenyewe wanaotaka mahali rafiki pa kuanzia.

entries.source: Custom content, prompts, and workflows can be adapted around NCERT needs and school-specific classroom priorities.
entries.value: Maudhui maalum, vidokezo, na mitiririko ya kazi vinaweza kurekebishwa kulingana na mahitaji ya NCERT na vipaumbele maalum vya darasa la shule.
